# SSH 从文件执行多条命令
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 从文件读取命令逐行执行
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd_file": "/path/to/commands.txt"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d645f66696c65223a20222f706174682f746f2f636f6d6d616e64732e747874227d
